Our Approach

How We Work With You

We don't just sell policies. We build protection strategies tailored to your specific operation.

Listen

We learn your operation inside-out — fleet size, routes, crew count, risk exposure — before making a single recommendation.

Question

We challenge assumptions and dig into the gaps. If your current coverage has blind spots, we find them before a claim does.

Recommend

We shop multiple carriers and build a custom coverage package — best rates, right limits, zero unnecessary overlap.

Execute

We handle the paperwork, filings, and follow-up. When a claim hits, we fight for you — not from behind a desk, but alongside you.

What We Cover

Insurance Solutions for Every Need

From commercial forestry operations to your family home — we build custom coverage plans that actually fit.

Forestry Insurance

Logger's broad form, equipment, liability, and specialized coverage for timber operations across the Southeast.

Learn More

Commercial Trucking

Commercial auto, cargo coverage, FMCSA filings, and fleet solutions for contract haulers and trucking companies.

Learn More

Learn More

Learn More

Dwelling, contents, personal liability, and flood coverage to protect your home and family.

Learn More

Auto Insurance

Car, truck, motorcycle, boat, and ATV coverage with competitive rates from top-rated carriers.

Learn More

Insurance the Way It Should Be

Swamp Fox Insurance Agency was founded in 1987 with a simple goal: to provide quality insurance for as many individuals and small businesses as possible. We achieve that goal by putting our customers first, every time.

We are proud to be endorsed by the South Carolina Timber Producers Association, and we provide coverage across South Carolina, Georgia, North Carolina, Alabama, Florida, Mississippi, Virginia, and Washington D.C.

Since
1987
Protecting SC

Why Choose Us

What Makes Us Great?

Our versatility, wide network of partnerships, extensive expertise, and commitment to excellence make Swamp Fox Insurance Agency the agency of choice in the southeastern United States.

The Forestry Experts

We are endorsed by the South Carolina Timber Producers Association.

Customized Coverage

Every person and business is unique. We shop multiple vendors for the best coverage and lowest rates.

Powerful Consulting

We provide consulting to all our clients to help them prevent loss or damage in and around the workplace.

What Our Clients Say

Trusted by Loggers, Truckers & Families

Swamp Fox has been our agency for over 15 years. They understand the logging business like no one else. When we had a major equipment claim, they fought for us and got it handled fast.

JH
James H.Logging Crew Owner, Berkeley County

As a fleet owner, finding the right insurance was always a headache. Swamp Fox simplified everything — better coverage, lower premiums, and an agent who actually picks up the phone.

RM
Robert M.Fleet Owner, Summerville SC

We switched to Swamp Fox for our home and auto policies. The personal service is unbeatable — they even helped us bundle everything to save over $800 a year.

SC
Sarah C.Homeowner, Moncks Corner SC
Common Questions

Your Top Questions, Answered

The things clients ask us most. Still not sure? Call (843) 761-3999 — or request a free, no-obligation quote.

Premiums depend on your fleet size, crew count, equipment values, hauling radius, and claims history. Because we're independent and work with multiple forestry-focused carriers, we shop the market for you. Most loggers who request a quote hear back within one business day with at least two carrier options to compare.

Yes — you don't have to wait for renewal. We handle the carrier transfer paperwork, and most existing policies can be cancelled with a pro-rated refund of unused premium. If switching saves you money or closes a coverage gap, we'll tell you; if it doesn't, we'll tell you that too.

An on-site or virtual walk-through of your operation — job sites, equipment, driver files, safety programs — led by a Swamp Fox consultant. We identify coverage gaps, premium-driving risk exposures, and practical safety improvements. There's no cost and no commitment; whether you end up as a client is up to you.

We're independent, so we're not tied to any one carrier. We place coverage through multiple A-rated markets specializing in forestry, commercial trucking, cargo, general liability, and personal lines across the Southeast. When we quote you, you see real options — not a single company's best guess.

You call us first — not a 1-800 number. A named Swamp Fox agent takes the claim, opens it with the carrier, and stays in the loop from notice through settlement. We advocate on your behalf, push back on low offers when they're wrong, and keep you informed at every step.

Yes. Most carriers we work with offer a multi-policy discount when you bundle home and auto, and additional discounts for things like bundled recreational vehicles, safe-driver history, or home protective devices. We'll quote each policy separately and bundled so you can see the real savings.

We're headquartered in Moncks Corner, SC and endorsed by the South Carolina Timber Producers Association — and we're licensed across South Carolina, Georgia, North Carolina, Alabama, Florida, Mississippi, Virginia, and Washington D.C. Wherever your trucks run, we can cover them.

Call (843) 761-3999

Ready to Protect What Matters?

Whether you're a logger running a crew or a homeowner in the Lowcountry, we'll find the right coverage at the right price.

(843) 761-3999

item.title: Coverage
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Coverage Built for Your World

Commercial and personal insurance solutions tailored to the Southeast.

What We Cover

From logging crews to family homes — explore our full range of commercial and personal insurance solutions.

Business

We take time to learn about your business before selecting a plan that fits. Every policy is customized to your operation.

Logging & Forestry
Logger's broad form, equipment, inland marine, timber liability

We are an SCTPA-endorsed insurance agency, specializing in full-spectrum forestry coverage including logger's broad form policies, equipment floaters, inland marine, timber harvesting liability, and environmental protection.

Commercial Auto / Trucking
Fleet auto, cargo, FMCSA filings, MCS-90, non-trucking liability

Full commercial auto coverage for logging trucks, flatbeds, chip vans, and contract haulers. We handle FMCSA filings, MCS-90 endorsements, cargo insurance, non-trucking liability, and fleet programs across the Southeast.

Cargo & Physical Damage
Motor truck cargo, trailer interchange, freight protection

Protect the freight you haul with motor truck cargo coverage, trailer interchange agreements, and physical damage policies for your fleet. We specialize in coverage for contract haulers, owner-operators, and fleet operators across the Southeast.

General Liability
Business liability, commercial property, umbrella/excess

Comprehensive general liability and commercial property coverage for businesses of all sizes. We also offer umbrella and excess liability policies for additional protection above your primary limits.

Equipment & Inland Marine
Skidders, feller bunchers, loaders, trailers, and mobile equipment

Protect your valuable equipment wherever it goes. We cover skidders, feller bunchers, knuckle-boom loaders, chippers, trailers, and all mobile forestry and construction equipment with specialized inland marine policies.

Personal

We shop a variety of carriers to find the best coverage and value for your personal situation.

Homeowners Insurance
Dwelling, contents, personal liability, flood protection

Comprehensive homeowners coverage including dwelling protection, personal property, liability, additional living expenses, and optional flood coverage. Tailored to your specific home and location across the Lowcountry and beyond.

Auto Insurance
Car, truck, motorcycle, boat, ATV, RV

Competitive rates from top carriers for all your vehicles. Coverage includes liability, collision, comprehensive, uninsured/underinsured motorist, medical payments, and roadside assistance.

Life & Health
Term life, whole life, individual health plans

Protect your family's financial future with term life, whole life, and individual health insurance plans. We compare options from multiple carriers to find the right coverage at the right price.

Umbrella / Excess
Extra liability above primary limits for individuals

Umbrella and excess liability policies provide an additional layer of protection above your primary insurance limits — essential for high-net-worth individuals and anyone wanting extra peace of mind.

Camper & RV Insurance
Full-time or part-time RV, travel trailer, motorhome

Whether you're a weekend warrior or full-time RVer, we provide specialized camper and RV insurance that covers your home on wheels. Includes collision, comprehensive, personal effects, and emergency expenses.

Operations We Cover

From Stump to Mill — Every Phase Covered

Tap a phase of operation to see the coverage we build around it.

Harvesting & Felling

Protect skidders, feller-bunchers, chainsaws, and the crews that run them. Our Logger's Broad Form covers equipment in the woods, in transit, and at the landing — with optional fire, theft, and vandalism.

  • Equipment & mobile-equipment physical damage
  • Workers' comp & general liability
  • Chainsaw, hand-tool & rigging coverage

Forwarders & In-Woods Transport

Forwarders, skidders, and bunchers work in brutal conditions. Our broad-form equipment policies anticipate stump damage, track failure, and off-road hazards the way generic commercial policies don't.

  • Off-road & in-woods collision protection
  • Mobile equipment blanket scheduling
  • Operator liability & crew coverage

Loading & Landings

Knuckleboom loaders, log-yard pickers, and landing operations carry unique pinch points. We structure policies around loader-specific physical damage, falling-log liability, and bystander coverage.

  • Knuckleboom & loader physical damage
  • Landing-site liability & property
  • Products/completed-operations for log buyers

Log Truck Transport

From single owner-operators to fleets of 30+, we handle FMCSA filings, cargo coverage, trailer interchange, and physical damage — plus the UM/UIM terms that actually protect you when another driver's at fault.

  • Motor truck cargo & trailer interchange
  • FMCSA BMC-91, MCS-90, UCR filings
  • Primary / non-trucking liability (bobtail)

Timber Yards & Storage

When logs leave the woods and sit at a yard, they're exposed to fire, theft, weather, and dispute. Our policies extend inland marine and stored-goods coverage to protect high-value timber before it hits the mill.

  • Inland marine & stored log coverage
  • Fire, theft, windthrow & weather
  • Yard liability & premises protection

Not sure what coverage you need?

Let us review your situation and recommend the right plan — no cost, no obligation.

(843) 761-3999

item.title: Forestry & Logging Insurance
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
SCTPA Endorsed

Forestry & Logging Insurance

SCTPA-endorsed forestry agency — coverage built by people who understand the woods.

Coverage Built for the Woods

Single-owner crews running shortwood out of Berkeley County. Multi-truck fleets hauling pine into the mills at Eastover. Sawmills, wood dealers, pulpwood buyers. We insure every link in the SC timber supply chain — and we've been doing it since 1987.

Swamp Fox is endorsed by the South Carolina Timber Producers Association. That's not marketing — that's nearly four decades of showing up when a claim hits.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Logger's broad form — felled timber, logs on skids
  • Mobile equipment (skidders, chippers, forwarders, loaders)
  • Commercial general liability for job-site operations
  • Business auto & trucking, including FMCSA filings
  • Motor truck cargo for tractor-trailers
  • Pollution liability (fuel & hydraulic spills)
  • Workers' compensation for crews
  • Inland marine on owned & leased equipment

item.title: Commercial Trucking
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Commercial Trucking Insurance

From single owner-operators to multi-state fleets — we keep the trucks that move the Southeast on the road.

Fleet-Grade Coverage, Personal Service

Running log loads down I-95 to Savannah. Hauling flatbeds through the Piedmont. Running Hwy 52 into the port of Charleston. Commercial trucking is the most regulated, highest-risk class we insure — and we've been handling the FMCSA paperwork, CDL driver files, and cargo/trailer/bobtail exposure for SC carriers since 1987.

One truck or fifty, you work with a named Swamp Fox agent who picks up the phone when a DOT officer pulls your driver over at 2 a.m. — not a 1-800 hotline.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Commercial auto liability (primary & excess)
  • Physical damage on tractors & trailers
  • Motor truck cargo — actual cash or agreed value
  • MCS-90 & BMC-91 federal filings
  • Non-owned & hired auto
  • Trailer interchange agreements
  • Bobtail & deadhead coverage
  • Workers' comp for drivers & mechanics

item.title: Cargo & Physical Damage
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Cargo & Physical Damage

The freight in your trailer is often worth more than the rig itself. Insure it like it.

Real Protection for What You Haul

A single cargo loss — a refrigeration failure, a load shift, a trailer fire — can wipe out a year of margin. We place cargo coverage with carriers that specialize in the freight you actually move, with limits that match real market values.

Pair it with physical damage on your tractors and trailers and you're covered whether the rig is loaded, deadhead, or parked.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Motor truck cargo (ACV or agreed value)
  • Tractor & trailer physical damage
  • Refrigeration breakdown for reefers
  • Trailer interchange
  • Loading & unloading coverage
  • Earned freight & debris removal
  • Specialty commodity add-ons (logs, produce, autos)
  • Replacement cost on new-model tractors

item.title: General Liability
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
General Liability Insurance

The foundation every business needs — protection against the claims you never see coming.

One Claim Away from Closing the Doors

A slip in a Main Street storefront, damaged customer property on a contractor's job site, a defective product shipped out the back door — general liability is the layer that keeps one bad day from ending a family business. We structure coverage around your actual operations, not a generic SIC code.

Contractors get blanket additional insured endorsements so you can bid the big jobs. Retail, restaurants, and service shops across the Lowcountry get premises + products-completed-ops on a single policy. We've been doing it for SC small businesses since 1987.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Bodily injury & property damage
  • Products & completed operations
  • Personal & advertising injury
  • Medical payments to third parties
  • Premises liability
  • Tenant's legal liability for leased space
  • Blanket additional insured endorsements
  • Defense costs inside or outside limits

item.title: Homeowners Insurance
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Homeowners Insurance

Protecting your home, your belongings, and your family across South Carolina.

Your Home Deserves the Right Coverage

Lowcountry homes catch the worst of it — hurricane-season wind, afternoon lightning, surprise pipe freezes in February. We've insured 37 years of SC homes, which means we know which carriers actually pay out when a live oak takes out the roof.

First home in Moncks Corner, retired on a golf course in Summerville, or a coastal second home at Edisto? We shop multiple carriers and tailor coverage to the exact build quality, wind zone, and your actual belongings — not a generic SIC-code template.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Dwelling & attached structures
  • Other structures (garages, sheds, fences)
  • Personal property (replacement cost available)
  • Personal liability & medical to others
  • Additional living expenses if displaced
  • Optional flood & windstorm coverage
  • Scheduled items (jewelry, firearms, art)
  • Service-line & equipment-breakdown add-ons

item.title: Auto Insurance
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Auto Insurance

Competitive rates from top carriers for cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, and more.

Drive with Confidence

I-26 commute to Charleston every morning. Weekends towing a jonboat to Lake Marion. A Berkeley County teenager about to get their beginner's permit. Every SC driver's policy should fit the actual driving, not a stripped-down minimum-limits template.

SC's minimum liability (25/50/25) almost never covers a real crash. We'll show you what 100/300/100 actually costs, why UM/UIM should match your liability limits (1 in 8 SC drivers carry no insurance), and where bundling with home saves real money.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Bodily injury & property damage liability
  • Collision (at-fault damage to your car)
  • Comprehensive (theft, weather, animal strikes)
  • Uninsured & underinsured motorist (UM/UIM)
  • Medical payments (MedPay)
  • Rental reimbursement & roadside
  • Motorcycle, boat, ATV, RV & golf-cart
  • Multi-vehicle & bundle-with-home discounts

item.title: Life & Health
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Life & Health Insurance

Protect the people you love — with plans that actually fit your life, not a corporate catalog.

Coverage for the Stages of Your Life

Life and health insurance isn't one-size-fits-all. A young family needs different protection than a business owner with key employees, and retirees have different needs again. We walk you through the options — term vs. whole life, major medical vs. supplemental — and help you pick what makes sense for your stage.

Because we're independent, we quote multiple carriers side-by-side so you see real rate differences — not one company's pitch.

Call (843) 761-3999

What We Offer

  • Term life (10-, 20-, 30-year)
  • Whole & universal life
  • Final expense / burial policies
  • Individual major medical
  • Short-term & long-term disability
  • Critical illness & cancer plans
  • Long-term care
  • Key-person coverage for business owners

item.title: Umbrella & Excess
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Umbrella & Excess Liability

The layer that kicks in when primary limits aren't enough — and keeps a bad day from becoming a bankruptcy.

When the Primary Limit Runs Out

Jury awards keep climbing. A single serious auto wreck on I-26, a slip-and-fall at your shop, a products claim from something shipped two years ago — any of them can blow past a primary policy's limits. Umbrella and excess liability sit above your auto, general liability, and (sometimes) employers liability layers to protect the farm, the fleet, the home, and the business you built for your kids.

We structure towers from $1M to $25M+ depending on exposure, and we review them every renewal so limits keep pace with what you actually have to lose.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Excess over commercial auto liability
  • Excess over general liability
  • Excess over employers liability (where permitted)
  • Personal umbrella over home & auto
  • Blanket additional insured
  • Worldwide coverage territory
  • Defense costs outside limits
  • Towers structured from $1M to $25M+

item.title: Equipment Insurance
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Equipment & Inland Marine

Skidders, feller bunchers, loaders, trailers — insured wherever they're working.

Coverage That Moves With Your Equipment

A standard commercial property policy only covers equipment while it's at a fixed location. Inland marine fills the gap: it covers mobile equipment in transit, on a job site, rented, borrowed, or loaned — exactly how logging and construction equipment actually gets used.

We schedule skidders, feller bunchers, knuckleboom loaders, chippers, excavators, service trucks, and trailers on inland marine floaters with replacement cost, broad perils, and the right deductible for your operation.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Skidders, feller bunchers & forwarders
  • Knuckleboom & log loaders
  • Chippers, grinders & stump grinders
  • Excavators, dozers & graders
  • Mobile generators & light towers
  • Tools & attachments on floaters
  • Rented, leased & borrowed equipment
  • Transit, job-site & overnight storage

item.title: Camper / RV Insurance
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Camper & RV Insurance

Weekend trips, full-time living, or anywhere in between — we insure the home you travel in.

More Than Just Auto Coverage

A camper or RV isn't covered by your auto policy when it's detached, and it's not covered by homeowners once it leaves the driveway. A dedicated camper/RV policy covers the vehicle, the contents, and personal liability at the campsite — whether you're a weekend traveler or a full-timer living on the road.

We quote travel trailers, fifth wheels, Class A/B/C motorhomes, pop-ups, and toy haulers. For full-timers, we structure full-timer coverage that mirrors a homeowners policy with replacement-cost contents and vacation liability.

Call (843) 761-3999

What's Typically Covered

  • Physical damage (collision & comprehensive)
  • Liability while towing or driving
  • Personal contents & awnings
  • Vacation / campsite liability
  • Full-timer package (mirrors homeowners)
  • Emergency expense if RV is uninhabitable
  • Roadside assistance & towing
  • Travel trailers, 5th wheels, Class A/B/C, pop-ups

item.title: Loss Control
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Alirics Services

Prevent Losses Before They Happen

On-site safety consulting, DOT compliance, and OSHA expertise through Alirics Services — the safety division of Swamp Fox Insurance Agency.

(843) 761-3999
Protecting Fleets Since 1987
How It Works

Loss Control That Works

Loss control helps you absorb incidents before they become claims, and recover faster when they do. Our goal is to help you run a fleet that's DOT-compliant, safer on the road, and more profitable at the end of the quarter.

An Alirics Specialist can assist you with your concerns whether or not you are a current client.

Our Principles

Prevention Awareness Compliance Detection Investigation Resolution

Loss Control Services Provide:

Education
Tailored Plans
Training
Profitability
Solutions
Opportunities

The Alirics Expertise

Knowledgeable insights in two crucial areas:

Department of Transportation

DOT regulations create several compliance exposures. CDL requirements carry specific responsibilities for carriers. Your SAFER reports are used by a wide range of organizations.

OSHA Regulations

OSHA regulations involve specific industry processes for reviewing each company. We have the know-how and resources to help you meet compliance.

What to Expect

Field Demos & Tech Sessions

Hands-on demonstrations of the latest forestry equipment, telematics platforms, and safety technology — built for working loggers and fleet managers.

Industry Recognition

The Pinnacle Award

Honoring outstanding loggers and forestry professionals across the Southeast for safety leadership, operational excellence, and community impact.

Networking

Carriers, Vendors & Loggers

Connect with insurance carriers, equipment vendors, and forestry professionals from across the Southeast — all in one place over two full days.

Summit History

Three Years of the Loggers Technology Summit

Established in 2023, the Loggers Technology Summit has grown each year — bringing forestry professionals, insurance carriers, and equipment vendors together across the Southeast. The 2026 event in Birmingham is the 4th annual gathering.

2023
1st Annual

The inaugural Loggers Technology Summit launched, bringing safety and tech sessions to Southeastern logging professionals for the first time.

2024
2nd Annual

Featured in Southern Logging Times. Expanded sessions covered fleet management, driver performance, and emerging telematics platforms.

2025
3rd Annual

Continued growth in attendance and carrier participation, with field demonstrations, vendor exhibits, and the Pinnacle Award recognition ceremony.

Watch Past Summit Recaps Request Past Event Booklets

item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: Swamp Fox Insurance Agency
item.content:encoded:
Our Story

Family-owned since 1987. Rooted in South Carolina. Serving the Southeast.

Since 1987

Built on Relationships, Driven by Expertise

Swamp Fox Insurance Agency was founded in 1987 with a simple goal: to provide quality insurance for individuals and small businesses by putting our customers first. We shop a variety of carriers to find the best coverage and best value for your situation.

We are endorsed by the South Carolina Timber Producers Association — and we'd be proud to find a plan that works for you.

Our Mission & Pledge

Protecting What Matters Most

We provide risk transfer advice that protects your assets with the broadest coverage at the most affordable price. We listen, question, recommend, and execute — whether business or personal. We exhaust all avenues to find cost-effective insurance and back it up with genuine advocacy for you.

Meet Swamp Fox

Hear Our Story, Straight From the Team

Our Story • Since 1987

Who We Are. Who We Protect.

A quick look at why loggers, truckers, and families across the Southeast trust Swamp Fox.

Click to play

The People We Protect

Rooted in South Carolina
Family & Home
Commercial Trucking
Fleet & Auto
Life & Legacy
Renters

Key Milestones

1987 — Founded

Opens in Moncks Corner, SC, serving local forestry and small business communities.

SCTPA Endorsed

Becomes an SCTPA-endorsed insurance agency — a partnership held to this day.

7+ States & 4 Offices

Expands across the Southeast with offices in Moncks Corner, Summerville, and Waycross, GA.

2023–2026 — Loggers Summit

Launches the annual Loggers Technology Summit, now heading to its 4th year in Birmingham, AL.

Community

Giving Back to Our Roots

Beyond insurance, we invest in our communities through scholarships, Citadel partnerships, fire safety initiatives, youth sports sponsorships, and the annual Pinnacle Award recognizing excellence in the logging industry.

The Pinnacle Award

The Pinnacle Award is presented annually by Swamp Fox Insurance Agency to recognize excellence in the logging industry. It honors operators who demonstrate exceptional commitment to safety, professionalism, and environmental stewardship. Past recipients represent the very best in South Carolina's timber community.

Swamp Fox Scholarship

The Swamp Fox Scholarship supports the next generation of leaders in forestry and related fields. Awarded to deserving students in South Carolina, this scholarship reflects our commitment to investing in the communities and industries we serve. We believe in building the future of forestry through education.

Citadel Program

Swamp Fox partners with The Citadel, The Military College of South Carolina, through our cadet mentorship and internship program. This initiative provides hands-on industry exposure to future leaders while reinforcing our deep ties to South Carolina's military heritage — the very heritage that inspired our name.
